title: A Ore Venture
description: Mining ores..... NOT FUN! Copper, diamonds, iron, netherite, gold, lapis, redstone and what else? This mod adds more ores to your game!!
body:
Mining ores..... NOT FUN! Copper, diamonds, iron, netherite, gold, lapis, redstone and what else? This mod adds more ores to your game!!

 

A Ore Venture is a mod that increases the ammount of ores in your game. These can be used to make overpowered tools, such as "Ore Detector" which will detect if there are new ores in the block you click!

It already has recipes, but as of the alpha, a LOT of stuff might be missing.

The Ore Detector works by right clicking a block, and sending you a message which says "(Ore) found at (coordinates)"

### Dependencies
- **Fabric API**: Required for mod functionality.
